documents.title: IRS Form W-4, Employee's Withholding Certificate, 2025
documents.license_note: IRS / US federal form; works of the US government are generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Fillable AcroForm with checkboxes, line numbers, withholding tables, and signature block.

documents.title: IRS Instructions for Form 1040, 2025 (General Instructions)
documents.license_note: IRS / US federal publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Multi-page instruction booklet mixing prose paragraphs, numbered steps, cross-references, and embedded tax tables.

documents.title: IRS Form 941, Employer's Quarterly Federal Tax Return, 2025
documents.license_note: IRS / US federal form; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Flat quarterly tax form with ruled boxes, line-item amounts, and voucher stub.

documents.title: IRS Form 1120, U.S. Corporation Income Tax Return, 2024
documents.license_note: IRS / US federal form; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Multi-page corporate return with schedules, checkboxes, and dense numeric line items.

documents.title: GSA SF-1035, Public Voucher for Purchases and Services Other Than Personal
documents.license_note: GSA / US federal standard form; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Column-ruled voucher grid with quantity, unit price, and amount columns; AcroForm fields.

documents.title: OPM SF-2809, Health Benefits Election Form
documents.license_note: OPM / US federal standard form; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Multi-page benefits election form with plan tables, checkboxes, and fillable fields.

documents.title: US4070811, Pressure sensor with apertured member for isolating diaphragm
documents.license_note: USPTO patent publication; US government public record. Bulk redistribution terms should be verified before committing binaries.
documents.expected_shape: Short pre-1990 image-only patent (5 pages) with CCITT page scans, column text, and drawing sheets.

documents.title: US3878504, Magnetic recording medium with metallic magnetic powder
documents.license_note: USPTO patent publication; US government public record.
documents.expected_shape: Medium-length pre-1990 image patent (7 pages) with typed specification and chemical-formula drawings.

documents.title: US4184040, Method of producing optical fiber preform
documents.license_note: USPTO patent publication; US government public record.
documents.expected_shape: Compact pre-1990 image patent (4 pages) with process-flow drawings.

documents.title: US4523187, Anti-lock brake control system
documents.license_note: USPTO patent publication; US government public record.
documents.expected_shape: Longer pre-1990 image patent (10 pages) with multi-sheet mechanical drawings and claims.

documents.title: US4743676, Discharge lamp having amorphous metal alloy electrode
documents.license_note: USPTO patent publication; US government public record.
documents.expected_shape: Late-1980s image patent (6 pages) with electro-optical schematic figures.

documents.title: OMB FY2027 Analytical Perspectives Table 16-1, Federal Budget by Agency and Account
documents.license_note: White House / OMB federal publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Very long landscape PDF (500+ pages) dominated by repeated budget-account tables with wrapped labels and numeric columns.

documents.title: OMB FY2027 Analytical Perspectives, Federal Outlays by Function and Subfunction
documents.license_note: White House / OMB federal publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Multi-page budget chapter with expenditure tables, subtotals, and footnotes.

documents.title: OMB FY2027 Analytical Perspectives, Federal Investment
documents.license_note: White House / OMB federal publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Short analytical chapter with investment-spending tables and explanatory prose.

documents.title: Treasury Monthly Treasury Statement, January 2025
documents.license_note: US Department of the Treasury publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Monthly fiscal report with receipt/outlay summary tables, account schedules, and debt tables.

documents.title: Census Bureau P60-280, Income and Poverty in the United States: 2023
documents.license_note: US Census Bureau publication; generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Statistical report with demographic tables, time series, and chart/table hybrids.

documents.title: Federal Reserve G.17, Industrial Production and Capacity Utilization
documents.license_note: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System statistical release; US government work, generally public domain.
documents.expected_shape: Statistical release with seasonally adjusted index tables, sector breakdowns, and revision notes.

failed_sources.reason: HTTP 403 from Akamai; non-browser client blocked.
HTTP 403; SSA forms CDN blocks automated download.
HTTP 404; GSA form filename pattern changed or form retired.
HTTP 403 from Akamai; BLS news release PDFs block non-browser clients.
HTTP 503 from archive.org; service unavailable during crawl window.
LOC tile server returned empty/non-PDF response for direct PDF URL.
GovInfo returned HTML error page (44 KB) instead of PDF for automated fetch.
